release_target: Entire product — AgentMesh CLI + Web Dashboard (targeted: web component/CSS legibility pass, agentmesh adapter cross-platform fix, CLI doctor script)
ship_decision_applies_to: packages/web, packages/cli, packages/agentmesh-core, packages/agentmesh-adapters, packages/core (changed surfaces this run)

surface_map.blast_radius_upgrade: font-size legibility bumps across 8 components + mc-*.css; @sentry/nextjs dep added
opencode-adapter: removed hardcoded /tmp path + tail shell-out (Windows-breaking) -> getActivityLogPath + fs.readFile
vitest pool:forks added -> fixes prior crash race

environment_matrix.note: Local dev tool (CLI + local dashboard), not hosted SaaS with payments. Staging gap rule does not strictly apply.

fixes_applied.description: ao-doctor.ps1 unknown-flag handler: Write-Error -> [Console]::Error.WriteLine. Windows PowerShell 5.1 console-width-wrapped Write-Error split 'Unknown option' across lines, failing the doctor-ps1 test. Now clean single-line stderr, matches bash echo >&2.
.ux-test/ added to .gitignore so /ship screenshot+drive.py artifacts are not accidentally committed.

prior_blockers_resolved.description: P0 OpenClaw token committed at 0393ab70 (prior critical path). Commit hash no longer resolves ('Not a valid object name') after repo migration (commit 09c6c43). Full-history token sweep found only placeholder/redaction test fixtures (ghp_xxx, Bearer eyJ...abc). No real secret reproducible.
prior_blockers_resolved.residual_human_action: If any old remote/fork still carries pre-migration history, rotate the OpenClaw token defensively.

prior_blockers_resolved.description: Intermittent agentmesh-core crash under concurrent pnpm test load (better-sqlite3 native exit race).
prior_blockers_resolved.evidence: vitest pool:forks added; full suite ran with zero crashes; agentmesh-core 32/32 clean.

claims_tested.claim: agentmesh-core test suite zero failures + no crash
CLI doctor-ps1 rejects unknown flags with exit 1
no real secrets in current git history

open_findings.title: @sentry/nextjs added to deps but never initialized
open_findings.detail: packages/web/package.json declares @sentry/nextjs ^10.58.0 but there is no sentry.client/server/edge.config.ts, no instrumentation.ts, no Sentry init in next.config.js, and no Sentry.* usage in src. Dead dependency: ships bundle weight, provides no error monitoring, implies observability that does not exist. Not auto-repaired: requires a DSN (secret) and a product decision.
open_findings.fix_direction: Either (a) wire it: add instrumentation.ts + sentry.*.config.ts with SENTRY_DSN env, wrap next.config.js with withSentryConfig, document SENTRY_DSN in .env.local.example; or (b) remove the dependency until monitoring is actually adopted.

open_findings.title: Node engine mismatch warning on every install/test
open_findings.detail: Local Node is v20.17.0 but workspace requires >=20.18.3. pnpm prints 'Unsupported engine' on every command. Not a code defect; bump local Node or confirm CI pins >=20.18.3.
open_findings.fix_direction: Install Node >=20.18.3 locally; verify CI workflow node version satisfies the engines field.
